steps.title: Spot the defining claim about Gloria's leadership
steps.content: The passage explicitly states that Gloria Richardson “was also the leader of what became known as the Cambridge movement.” This directly answers what the question asks.

steps.title: Apply this statement to the choices
steps.content: The Cambridge movement is identified in the passage as what Gloria Richardson led. The other three options describe things not mentioned in the text (a new business, environmental activism, her daughter's school). That matches choice A — A is correct.
